content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "k-String". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/219/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer k. The second line contains a string s of length n.
content.outputFormat: The k-string of the given string s.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use a loop to repeat the string k times.

code.Python3:
k = int(input())
s = input()
for _ in range(k):
    print(s, end='')
